text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is so quick to grasp new
techniques she starts begging for intensive
training regimens every day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon, who has had her eye on Mayano
Top Gun, takes this opportunity to work with her
in my stead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She conducts her training in such a unique way
that it soon leaves Mayano Top Gun dissatisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, Hishi Amazon warns her that, despite
her good instincts, she's not paying attention to
her surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words strike a chord within Mayano Top Gun,
who hates losing. She slowly, but surely, begins to
get the hang of the training.
